task_completion.description: Navigate to the Projects workspace in Nuxeo
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo web interface in a browser (http://localhost:8080/nuxeo), with the 'Projects' workspace visible.
Look for the 'Project Proposal' document page being viewed in the Nuxeo interface.

task_completion.description: Access the section to add supplementary attachments
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent navigating to an 'Attachments', 'Files', or 'Edit' tab/section of the document where additional files can be uploaded.

task_completion.description: Select the correct PDF file for upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file picker dialog or file manager window showing the selection of 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf' specifically from the '/home/ga/nuxeo/data/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the attachment is added to the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Q3_Status_Report.pdf' successfully listed in the attachments or files section of the Project Proposal document.

task_completion.description: Verify the main file was not replaced
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the original main file of the document still being listed as the primary file or content, confirming it was not overwritten or replaced by the newly attached PDF.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with Nuxeo
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent navigated the Nuxeo GUI in a web browser rather than using terminal commands or scripts to upload the file.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded the existing file from the specified path
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent selected the file from '/home/ga/nuxeo/data/' rather than creating a new dummy file with the same name.

integrity.description: Agent did not use API shortcuts
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent did not use curl or Nuxeo REST API scripts in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target document path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Proposal. Attachment filename: Q3_Status_Report.pdf. Attachment path: /home/ga/nuxeo/data/Q3_Status_Report.pdf. The file must be added as a supplementary attachment (files:files property), preserving the main file (file:content property).
